author: Redacts
text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmed2 hours agoReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by Redacts on2 hours agoSalah staying would be welcomed, but he's on 20mil odd per year... and wants to play every game.However i'd happily pay him double but based upon a very modest weekly wage and the rest on performance metrics. And for him to accept a new striker super sub role, he might play less minutes but could give us more in goals and assists.If that works for all parties then why not... if he has better options or wants to be the main guy then I hope he finds an opportunity to do that.And call me crazy but I like the idea of Nunez on a free, we need cover for Ekitike especially and Isak too, he's the pressing monster that will create space for others to shine even if he misses 1 in 3 chances.Getting both doesn't make sense and neither at the expense of a first choice DM, Winger and RB + CB which are all more critical priorities.
